case_title: HONG MY CROMWELL VS. PHAU THIEN LAM

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROMWELL, HONG MY NGO AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, PHAU THIEN , AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NEW HOME MENU RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
